data.content: Boosted settings pizazz with stronger purple/green treatment across sheet shell, section cards, dispatch/action containers, repos surfaces, and defaults selector controls while preserving behavior. Quality gates passed in dedicated worktree: bun run lint (warnings only), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test (1941 passed), NODE_ENV=production bun run build. Feature commit 45683fd2ff3b pushed to origin/worktree-foolery-0df2-pizazz-4 and integrated to origin/main.
